title: Contact – Liz Twist MP for Blaydon and Consett Constituency
h1: Liz Twist MP for Blaydon and Consett Constituency
meta_description: Contact You can contact the Office of Liz Twist MP by emailing liz.twist.mp@parliament.uk. Alternatively, you can call 0191 414 2488 to speak to a member of the office team. Get in touch Fill you details in the form here and a member of my team will be in touch.
